title: iberis intermedia subsp. timeroyi
intro: Iberis intermedia subsp. timeroyi, also known as Rock Cress, is a perennial herb native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds that can help to soothe and calm irritated skin and mucous membranes. The health benefits of Rock Cress include reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, as well as its potential to alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Rock Cress can be prepared as a herbal tea or infused oil, and is also used in topical applications for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties.
